{{Quote|We've been able to learn the hyperspace route InterGal’s ships are going to take. They'll arrive by way of Rimma 13, and are scheduled to decant from hyperspace at 1400 hours, Eriadu local time. The folks we're employing to execute the strike will be able to calculate the precise reentry coordinates.|[[Patch Bruit]]|<ref name="DMS" />}}
'''[[Rimma 13]]''' was a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] exit point located within the [[Eriadu system/Legends|Eriadu system]],<ref name="DMS" /> a part of [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="Region" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It shared its name with the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]].<ref name="DMS" />

{{Loc-stub}}
